title: Vtopmart Clear Plastic Storage boxes, 6 PCS Storage Baskets with Handle for Bathroom, Kitchen Cupboard, Fridge, Pantry Organizers and Storage,Multi-Use, BPA Free, Large
features: Make Your Life Much Easier ---- You can use these pantry bins for various things throughout your home to organize and make your life easier. They are great for creating a clean and organized refrigerator or pantry. Ideal for fruit, vegetables, drinks, yogurts, canned goods, meat. You also can use them for storing dry goods in your pantry.

Built-in Handles ---- The bins have handle grips on the edge making it easy to carry and access contents. You just take the bins out and get the items you want, then put it back in so simple. Organize all of your kitchen essentials to make organizing and everyday living with ease, creating a clean and organized home.

Clear and Sturdy ---- Made of premium BPA free durable polyethylene material, these refrigerator organizers are lightweight and sturdy. They are clear, so you can see what you want without having to take the whole bin out of the fridge. Use side by side to create a storage solution that works best for you.

Functional and Versatile ---- With the perfect size, these plastic storage bins are great for cabinets and deep pantry shelves as well as inside the fridge or freezer. You can use them in any room of the home, such as in craft rooms, laundry rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchens, offices, garages, toy room, playroom and more.

Cleaning Instructions ---- Please clean these pantry organizers by hand only with mild soap and warm water. These storage bins are NOT dishwasher safe, please do not place in dishwasher. The size of each kitchen cabinet organizer is: 11.2"Lx 7.5"W x 6"H
description: Product Description Vtopmart has 4 different sizes--Variety of sizes help make the organization of different items more flexible and easier.You can choose the size according to your storage needs. Here is the size: S--9.4"L x 5.1"W x 4.3"H M--10''L x 6''W x 5''H L--11.2"Lx 7.5"W x 6"H XL--13"Lx 7.4"W x 7"H Large Storage Bins for Pantry Fit Multi Occasions Make Storage and Organization Simple These clear bins are great for creating a clean and organized refrigerator or pantry. Great for storing dry goods in the pantry; Maximize storage space in refrigerator, freezer, cabinets, cupboards, pantry shelves. Ideal for yogurts, canned goods, food packets, cheese, meat, drink boxes, baby food, juices, boxed foods, potatoes, onions, and apples. Versatile, lightweight and easy to transport, use them in craft rooms, laundry/utility rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchens, offices, garages, toy room, playroom and more. Washing Instructions: Please clean these pantry organizers by hand only with mild soap and warm water. They are NOT dishwasher safe, please do not place in dishwasher. Messy VS Neat
